creator: serhii.laskavyi@gmail.com
text:
I'm not sure if it's the same problem, but FreeBSD RELENG_8 i386 world and
GENERIC
> kernel: FreeBSD 8.0-STABLE #0: Thu Mar  4 20:46:05 EET 2010
and virtualbox-ose-kmod-3.1.2_1 caused kernel panic on every Virtualbox
Start operation (for MS Windows XP Pro SP3 guest)
> kernel: panic: swap_pager_force_pagein: read from swap failed
while RELENG_8_0 world and GENERIC
> kernel: FreeBSD 8.0-RELEASE-p2 #0: Thu Mar 11 20:47:52 EET 2010
runs virtualbox-ose-kmod-3.1.2_1 without problems.

Should I install RELENG_8 again and try to get a kernel backtrace? There is
no swap partition on this box.
